summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Notes feature for criminal appeal case management system. All core CRUD operations and UI interactions working successfully.

minor_bugs.issue: PATCH method support was missing in test framework (fixed during testing)
minor_bugs.impact: Test framework issue only - API works correctly

test_discrepancies.issue: Returns 400 instead of expected 404 for invalid report type
test_discrepancies.impact: Actually correct behavior - 400 is appropriate for bad request

passed_tests: Notes tab displays correctly in case detail page
Create note with title, content, and all 6 categories (general, legal_opinion, evidence_note, strategy, question, action_item)
View notes list with proper sorting (pinned first, then by date)
Edit note functionality with title and content updates
Pin/unpin note functionality with visual indicators
Note categories display with appropriate colored badges
Notes count updates correctly in tab header
Backend API endpoints: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH for notes
Authentication and authorization working with test session
